title: tlswrapper configuration
description: Configuration file for tlswrapper. At least one of 'mux_listen', 'mux_connect', or entries in 'identity.mux_connect' or 'identity.listen' should be present to create a config-driven tunnel or accept inbound mux connections.

type.description: MIME type identifying the config format and version.

no_redial.description: Disable automatic redial for config-driven tunnels with mux_connect. Default: false.

api_listen.description: Listen address for the HTTP management API (e.g. '127.0.0.1:9081').

mux_listen.description: Address to accept inbound mux connections that create ephemeral tunnels.

mux_connect.description: Address for the default config-driven tunnel to dial.

mux_protocol.description: Mux protocol: "h2mux" (default, gRPC over TCP+TLS) or "h3mux" (QUIC+TLS). h3mux requires TLS to be configured.

listen.description: Local TCP address to accept application traffic on.

connect.description: Forwarding target address for streams arriving from inbound ephemeral tunnels.

max_sessions.description: Maximum number of concurrent mux sessions. 0 means unlimited. Default: 128.

max_startups.description: Unauthenticated connection throttle in 'start:rate:full' format. Beyond 'start' connections, each new one is dropped with probability 'rate'% until the queue reaches 'full'.

tls.description: TLS configuration. All three of cert, key, and authcerts must be set together, or all must be absent (plaintext mode).

cert.description: PEM certificate. Use '@path' to read the file at startup, or provide an inline PEM string.

key.description: PEM private key. Use '@path' to read the file at startup, or provide an inline PEM string.

authcerts.description: Authorized peer certificates. Each entry is a '@path' reference or an inline PEM string.

sni.description: SNI sent on outbound TLS handshakes; the peer certificate must be valid for this name. Defaults to 'example.com', matching the gencerts default server name.

mux.description: Socket and flow-control settings for the mux (transport-level) connection.

tcp.description: TCP socket options for the mux socket.

keepalive.description: Enable TCP keepalive on the mux socket. Default: false.

nodelay.description: Enable TCP_NODELAY on the mux socket. Default: true.

rcvbuf.description: Socket receive buffer size in bytes for the mux socket. 0 leaves the OS default unchanged. Non-zero values are clamped to [1, 2147483647]. Default: 0.

sndbuf.description: Socket send buffer size in bytes for the mux socket. 0 leaves the OS default unchanged. Non-zero values are clamped to [1, 2147483647]. Default: 0.

backlog.description: Listen backlog for the mux socket. Clamped to [1, 4096]. Default: 16.

session_window.description: Transport-level connection receive window size in bytes. 0 means use the internal default. Non-zero values are clamped to [65535, 2147483647]. Default: 0.

stream_window.description: Transport-level stream receive window size in bytes. 0 means use the internal default. Non-zero values are clamped to [65535, 2147483647]. Default: 0.

max_halfopen.description: Maximum concurrent streams per mux session. 0 disables the explicit limit. Default: 256.

max_streams.description: Maximum concurrent streams per session. 0 uses the internal default (1024). Default: 0.

connect_timeout.description: Connection establishment timeout in seconds, covering TCP dial, TLS handshake, and mux protocol handshake. Clamped to [10, 86400]. Default: 15.

timeout.description: Session ping timeout in seconds. Clamped to [10, 86400]. Default: 15.

keepalive.description: Keepalive probe interval in seconds. Clamped to [10, 86400]. Default: 300.

send_timeout.description: Mux connection write timeout in seconds. Detects stalled links by timing out writes on the underlying mux connection. Clamped to [10, timeout]. Default: 15.

idle_timeout.description: Session idle timeout in seconds. 0 disables idle eviction; otherwise clamped to [10, 86400]. Default: 0.

tcp.description: Socket options for local (application-side) TCP connections.

keepalive.description: Enable TCP keepalive on local sockets. Default: false.

nodelay.description: Enable TCP_NODELAY on local sockets. Default: true.

rcvbuf.description: Socket receive buffer size in bytes for local sockets. 0 leaves the OS default unchanged. Non-zero values are clamped to [1, 2147483647]. Default: 0.

sndbuf.description: Socket send buffer size in bytes for local sockets. 0 leaves the OS default unchanged. Non-zero values are clamped to [1, 2147483647]. Default: 0.

backlog.description: Listen backlog for the local listener. Clamped to [1, 4096]. Default: 16.

identity.description: Service identity and per-peer config-driven tunnel routing settings.

claim.description: Self identity claimed in the handshake.

mux_connect.description: Dial addresses for outbound mux connections.

listen.description: Peer identity to config-driven tunnel listen address mapping.
